title: With U.S set to impose naval blockade, Iran warns it will strike back
summary_full: Peace talks broke down over Iran’s nuclear program, which has survived two decades of international diplomacy seeking to curtail it and more than five weeks of bombing.
summary_public: Peace talks broke down over Iran’s nuclear program, which has survived two decades of international diplomacy seeking to curtail it and more than five weeks of bombing.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran warns it will strike back
